settings.q: How much is delivery, and how long does it take?
settings.a: Free UK delivery on orders over £35. Under that, the cost is shown in full at checkout — never added as a surprise. Most of our range is dispatched within 1–2 days and arrives in about 4–7 working days. The Car Boot Liner is stocked in our UK warehouse, so it dispatches same-day and arrives in 2–5 working days. We'd rather give you honest timings than promise next-day and miss it.

settings.q: Where do your products ship from?
settings.a: We're a small UK business and we curate a tight range for anxious and rescue dogs rather than listing everything we can find. Some items are stocked here in the UK (like the Car Boot Liner); others are made and shipped by our manufacturing partner overseas, which is why those take about 4–7 working days. Either way, a real person answers your emails, usually the same day, and every order is covered by our 30-day guarantee.

settings.q: Do you ship outside the UK?
settings.a: Not at the moment — we're UK-only for now, so we can keep delivery reliable and support close to home.

settings.q: How do I track my order?
settings.a: You'll get a shipping confirmation email with a tracking link as soon as your order dispatches. If you can't find it, check your spam folder or email hello@thedognook.co.uk and we'll send it straight over.

You have a 30-day money-back guarantee. You also have a legal 14-day cancellation right under the Consumer Contracts Regulations. For hygiene reasons, used lick mats, snuffle mats and grooming items can't be returned once opened unless they're faulty.

settings.q: What if my item arrives faulty or damaged?
settings.a: Email us at hello@thedognook.co.uk with a photo and your order number, and we'll sort a replacement or refund. Faulty items are always covered, hygiene exception or not — that's your legal right and we stand behind it.

settings.q: How do I start a return?
settings.a: Just email hello@thedognook.co.uk with your order number and we'll walk you through it. No hoops, no scripts — a real person handles it.

settings.q: Do lick mats and snuffle mats actually help with anxiety?
settings.a: They give dogs a repetitive, nose-led job to focus on. Licking and sniffing are natural self-soothing behaviours, so many owners use them around fireworks, storms and settling a new rescue. They're comfort and enrichment tools, not medical treatments — if your dog has severe or ongoing anxiety, your vet is the right first port of call.

settings.q: How do I choose the right size?
settings.a: Each product page lists sizes and measurements — always check these against your dog before ordering. The Calming Donut Bed is currently available in Large (80cm), which suits most dogs up to Labrador size; measure your dog curled up and check that against the size before ordering. Not sure which to pick, or need a different size? Email us and we'll help.

settings.q: What are your products made from, and are they washable?
settings.a: Materials are listed on each product page. In short: our lick mats and slow-feeders are food-grade silicone or food-safe plastic and are dishwasher safe; the snuffle mat is fleece on a non-slip base and is machine washable (air dry, don't tumble dry — it damages the fabric strips); the donut bed has a removable, machine-washable cover. We choose durable, non-toxic materials throughout, since these get handled and mouthed by dogs every day.

settings.q: Is the grooming glove suitable for left-handed use?
settings.a: The grooming glove is a right-hand design. The strap adjusts to fit most hands, but if you groom left-handed it's worth knowing before you order.

settings.q: Are your products safe for all dogs?
settings.a: Our range is chosen with care for anxious and rescue dogs, but every dog is different. Always supervise your dog with a new item, check the size guide, and introduce grooming tools slowly if your dog is nervous about being handled. If in doubt, ask us or your vet.

settings.q: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.a: All major debit and credit cards, plus Shop Pay, Apple Pay and Google Pay — all processed securely through Shopify.
Yes. Payments are handled by Shopify's secure, encrypted checkout — we never see or store your card details.

settings.q: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
settings.a: If your order hasn't dispatched yet, email hello@thedognook.co.uk as soon as you can and we'll do our best to catch it. Once it's on its way, your 30-day guarantee and 14-day cancellation right have you covered.
